title: Decision Topic
description: Canonical record of architectural decisions for a specific topic. Prevents cross-session drift by providing a single source of truth that all AI agents and sessions must follow.

status.description: ACTIVE = follow these decisions. SUPERSEDED = replaced by another topic. ARCHIVED = no longer relevant.

revision.description: Monotonically increasing revision number. Every change increments this.

decided_by.description: Who made/confirmed these decisions (user, claude, codex, etc.).

decisions.description: Ordered list of decisions. Each has a clear statement and rationale.

constraints.description: Active constraints that all agents must respect.

rejected_alternatives.description: Approaches that were tried and rejected. Prevents repeating mistakes.

related_paths.description: Repo-relative paths affected by these decisions.

cross_repo_refs.description: References to other repos affected (e.g. 'dev-repo: src/services/').

reverted.description: True if this revision reverted a previous decision.

status.description: FINAL = locked, TENTATIVE = may change, REVERTED = was decided then undone.

revert_reason.description: Why this decision was reverted (if status=REVERTED).

tried_count.description: How many times this was attempted before rejecting.
